goal: Produce a fresh, live audit of the current Desktop domain-chip portfolio using discovery and portfolio-v3 scoring instead of stale status docs.
constraints: Base claims on commands that actually ran in this workspace
Do not overclaim maturity for shell or invalid chip directories
behavioral_changes: The repo now carries a dated live portfolio audit based on current discovery and portfolio-v3 output.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.registry import discover_chips; import json; print(json.dumps(discover_chips(), indent=2))"
follow_up: Use this audit to decide which chips remain active portfolio bets versus shell inventory.
If needed, run chip-by-chip deep dives on the top tier and the growth cluster separately.
